data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: An additional security measure to protect user accounts against unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Option to set up a six-digit PIN as a secondary security feature.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Protects messages, calls, photos, and videos sent on WhatsApp.
data.technical_spec: Employs the Signal Protocol for encryption, ensuring data confidentiality.

data.title: Fraudulent Activity Detection
data.description: Detects and blocks accounts engaging in spamming or phishing activities.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes machine learning algorithms to analyze messaging patterns and user behavior.

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Regular security audits and updates to identify and fix vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Involves regular penetration testing and code reviews.

data.title: Data Privacy Policies
data.description: Comprehensive data protection policies to ensure user privacy.
data.technical_spec: Implemented according to GDPR and other international regulations.
